Brand.name: Dental Map
Brand.tagline: The dentist booking engine, wired to the clinic.

Home.heroSubtitle: Search verified dentists across Cairo. See real open slots. Book instantly. The slot you pick is the slot that lands in the clinic's own calendar.
Home.trustTitle: Built for patients who've been burned by phone tag.
Home.trustOneBody: You can only review a dentist you actually booked and visited. No fake stars.
Home.trustTwoBody: Every slot shown is computed from the dentist's live calendar. No "we'll call you back."
Home.trustThreeBody: Browse in Arabic or English — the same booking, the same verified dentists.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your details to access your bookings.
Auth.signUpSubtitle: It takes a minute. You'll need it to book.
Auth.phoneHint: Used by the clinic to reach you — required.
